name: io.github.webloomhq/engine
title: WebLoom
description: Open-source MCP server giving AI agents 77 browser-control tools. Drives YOUR real Chrome with YOUR cookies, your session, your fingerprint (CDP attach, no headless spawn). Per-site protocol cracks (X transaction-id, TikTok signer). Multi-strategy fallback ladders for click, fill, upload across React/Lexical/Draft.js/Quill. Optional marketplace of community-authored Thread packs at webloom.run. Telemetry off by default.

environmentVariables.name: WEBLOOM_TELEMETRY
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the telemetry pref. Default OFF. Values: on|off

environmentVariables.name: WEBLOOM_AUTO_UPDATE
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for Thread auto-update tick. Default ON. Values: on|off

environmentVariables.name: WEBLOOM_PLAYBOOK
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for playbook file path. Default ~/.webloom/playbook.json
